PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  ns:   <http://rdf.freebase.com/ns/>
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?governor
WHERE
  { ns:m.0vmt  ns:government.governmental_jurisdiction.governing_officials  ?gov_official_node .
    ?gov_official_node
              ns:government.government_position_held.office_holder  ?governor ;
              ns:government.government_position_held.from  ?startDate
    OPTIONAL
      { ?gov_official_node
                  ns:government.government_position_held.to  ?endDate
      }
    FILTER ( ( ?startDate <= "2010-12-31"^^xsd:date ) && ( ( ! bound(?endDate) ) || ( ?endDate >= "2010-01-01"^^xsd:date ) ) )
  }
LIMIT   1

On what other date did the team won the 2010 World Series championship win the World Series?
sparql:
PREFIX  uom:  <http://www.opengis.net/def/uom/OGC/1.0/>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  ns:   <http://rdf.freebase.com/ns/>
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?otherWinDate
WHERE
  { ns:m.09gnk2r  ns:time.event.start_date  ?startDate ;
              ns:time.event.end_date  ?endDate
    BIND(ns:m.0713r AS ?team)
    ns:m.09gnk2r  ns:time.event.participant  ?team
    OPTIONAL
      { ?game  ns:time.event.part_of  ns:m.09gnk2r ;
               ns:time.event.start_date  ?gameDate ;
               ns:sports.game.winning_team  ?team
      }
    BIND(coalesce(?gameDate, ?startDate) AS ?winDate)
    FILTER ( ?winDate != ?endDate )
    BIND(?winDate AS ?otherWinDate)
  }
ORDER BY ?otherWinDate

question: Who governed the US state which includes the city of Phoenix during 2009?
sparql:
PREFIX  uom:  <http://www.opengis.net/def/uom/OGC/1.0/>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX  ns:   <http://rdf.freebase.com/ns/>
PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT DISTINCT  ?governor
WHERE
  { ns:m.0vmt  ns:government.governmental_jurisdiction.governing_officials  ?govNode .
    ?govNode  ns:government.government_position_held.office_holder  ?governor ;
              ns:government.government_position_held.from  ?startDate
    OPTIONAL
      { ?govNode  ns:government.government_position_held.to  ?endDate }
    ?govNode  ns:government.government_position_held.office_position_or_title  ?office .
    ?office   rdfs:label            ?officeLabel
    FILTER contains(lcase(?officeLabel), "governor")
    FILTER ( ?startDate <= "2009-12-31"^^xsd:date )
    FILTER ( ( ! bound(?endDate) ) || ( ?endDate >= "2009-01-01"^^xsd:date ) )
  }
LIMIT   1

question: What museum established earliest can be seen in Vienna Austria?
sparql:
PREFIX  uom:  <http://www.opengis.net/def/uom/OGC/1.0/>
PREFIX  owl:  <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX  rdf:  <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

PREFIX  xsd:  <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX  rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT  ?museum
WHERE
  { ?museum  ns:type.type.instance  ns:m.01y2hbz
    OPTIONAL
      { ?museum  ?locPredicate  ns:m.0jqflfy
        FILTER ( ( contains(str(?locPredicate), "location") || contains(str(?locPredicate), "place") ) || contains(str(?locPredicate), "city") )
      }
    OPTIONAL
      { ?museum  ?datePredicate  ?established
        FILTER ( ( contains(str(?datePredicate), "established") || contains(str(?datePredicate), "founding") ) || contains(str(?datePredicate), "date") )
      }
  }
ORDER BY ASC(?established)
LIMIT   1

question: What years was the World Series won by the 2010 World Series champions?

SELECT DISTINCT  ?year
WHERE
  { ?ws  ns:sports.sports_championship_event.champion  ns:m.0713r ;
         rdfs:label            ?label
    FILTER regex(?label, "^\\d{4} World Series")
    BIND(substr(?label, 1, 4) AS ?year)
  }
ORDER BY ?year
